name: Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad
description: IIM A is a leading Indian business school based in Ahmedabad, Gujarat, founded in 1961. Flagship IIM; case-method pedagogy and deep industry links. It delivers postgraduate management programmes, executive education, and research.

name: Indian Institute of Management Calcutta
description: IIM C is a leading Indian business school based in Kolkata, West Bengal, founded in 1961. India’s oldest IIM, strong in analytics and finance; widely called IIM Calcutta or IIMC, with its main campus at Joka, Kolkata. It delivers postgraduate management programmes, executive education, and research.
